description: Governance and job stream SSE behavior analysis

failedRequestsPattern.description: E2E tests show SSE endpoints with status=0 (connection reset on page nav)
failedRequestsPattern.cause: Playwright page.goto() tears down SSE connections, browser reports them as failed (status=0, not 401)
failedRequestsPattern.count: ~325 per test run (governance+job streams × reconnect intervals × test duration)

settingsExplainability401.cause: Public page (no auth) makes requests that fail before login
settingsExplainability401.classification: benign — occurs before login in beforeEach setup

authBlockSafetyNet.mechanism: On error, probes GET /api/cache-status; if 401, sets authBlockedRef=true and stops
authBlockSafetyNet.effectiveness: works when cookie is genuinely expired
authBlockSafetyNet.gap: transient network errors (fetch throws) are caught silently and do NOT set authBlockedRef

clientReconnectAnalysis.retryBehavior: indefinite 5s retries with no backoff — potential issue under sustained auth failure

deferredKnownIssues.description: Governance SSE stream reconnects without exponential backoff (fixed 5s delay)
deferredKnownIssues.impact: Under sustained auth failure, creates ~12 req/min of auth traffic; non-blocking
deferredKnownIssues.fix: Implement exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, max 30s) in use-governance-stream.ts
deferredKnownIssues.phase: P5 (Splunk optimization) or P7 (local AI hardening)

deferredKnownIssues.description: Auth-block safety net does not engage on fetch exceptions (only on 401 responses)
deferredKnownIssues.impact: If apiFetch probe throws (network error), authBlockedRef is never set, retries continue
deferredKnownIssues.fix: Move authBlockedRef check outside the try/catch so connectivity errors also stop retries

deferredKnownIssues.description: Playwright E2E tests record SSE connection resets as status=0 in failedRequests
deferredKnownIssues.impact: Test output is noisy (325 entries per run) but tests pass; cosmetic
deferredKnownIssues.fix: Filter status=0 from failedRequests in test assertions (already done in assertions but not in summary)

deferredKnownIssues.description: no-cors EventSource cannot set Authorization header — requires cookie auth
deferredKnownIssues.impact: If cookie is cleared (e.g. browser cache clear), streams cannot reconnect until page refresh
deferredKnownIssues.fix: Use fetch-based SSE polyfill instead of native EventSource to support Bearer token auth
